days.summary: Google shipped Chrome Skills, a new Gemini-powered browser feature that turns reusable prompts into one-click workflows across selected tabs, extending AI automation directly inside Chrome. ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for more natural real-time voice interaction, while AWS made the Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore generally available to speed enterprise agent deployment. On the research side, the paper "Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models" offers a potentially important recipe for improving post-training efficiency, though it remains early-stage academic work.
